title: Docker-backed staging matrix
goal: Use disposable Docker containers to clear the local G003 verification blocker without touching real cloud or production resources.
scope: Add a disposable Docker compose matrix for MySQL, Redis, virtual nginx/app target, fake provider, and backup/restore target.
Add a staging runner that exercises resource request approval/provisioning, live deploy, task-pull, backup, restore, rollback, logs, monitoring, and audit checks.
Keep real provider credentials and production signoff as external release-gate items.
